name: G.H.Y Culture & Media Holding Co., Limited
summary: G.H.Y Culture & Media Holding Co., Limited engages in the production and promotion of dramas, films, and concerts. The company produces dramas and films for television and video streaming platforms; and organizes concerts in Singapore, Malaysia, and Australia. It also provides talent management services for actors and actresses; and provision of costumes, props, and makeup services for artistes and third party production companies. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Singapore. It has additional offices in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia; Beijing, China; and Parramatta, Australia.
